title: Black Lung
description: Increases the general difficulty of the game.
body:
# Update 1.5 - The Sculk Lung Update is out now!

# Overview

## Black Lung is a mod which increases the difficulty of mining coal, venturing into the end and as of Version 1.5, exploring the sculky depths.

### This mod adds:

1 New Item

2 New Blocks

4 New Effects

3 New Potions

 


## Items

### Gas Mask

- Stops the Player from getting The Black Lung effect when mining Coal

- It DOES NOT remove The Black Lung effect if the Player already has the effect

- Greatly reduces the Player's vision



## Blocks

### Coal Dust

- Slows the Player's movement when walked on

- Is coughed up when the Player has The Black Lung effect

### Ender Dust

- Slows the Player's movement when walked on

- Is coughed up when the Player has The Ender Lung effect
 



## Effects

### Strong Lungs

- Effect is only obtainable via potion

- Removes the effects of The Black Lung, The Ender Lung and The Sculk Lung instantly

### The Black Lung

- Caused by mining coal with no breathing protection

- Continuously damages the Player until the effect is removed

- Makes the Player cough up Coal Dust
 
### The Ender Lung

- Caused by getting attacked by a mob from The End with no breathing protection

- Continuously damages the Player until the effect is removed

- Makes the Player cough up Ender Dust
 
### The Sculk Lung

- Caused by picking up or walking on Sculk related items and blocks with no breathing protection

- Continuously damages the Player until the effect is removed

- The coughing may call something unwanted




## Potions

### Potion of Strong Lungs

- Gives the Player Strong Lungs

- Lasts for 12 minutes

- Made with brewing a Pufferfish with a Thick Potion

- Comes with Splash, Lingering and Arrow Variants

### Potion of The Black Lung

- Gives the Player The Black Lung

- Lasts for 30 seconds

- Made with brewing a Block of Coal with a Thick Potion

- Comes with Splash, Lingering and Arrow Variants

### Potion of The Ender Lung

- Gives the Player The Ender Lung

- Lasts for 30 seconds

- Made with brewing an Enderpearl with a Thick Potion

- Comes with Splash, Lingering and Arrow Variants

 


## Config

- Disable or Enable coughing up Coal Dust

- Disable or Enable coughing up Ender Dust

- Disable or Enable spawning the Warden

- Adjustable chance for succumbing to Black Lung

- Adjustable chance for summoning The Warden

- Adjust the Sculk Lung Cooldown Length




# You can use this Mod in any Modpack.

# You are NOT allowed to reupload this mod anywhere without my permission NOR are you allowed to take credit for creating this mod.
